meaning: 波浪汹涌的,硕大强健的
examples: Visitors were set to work chopping wood.
He made a neat chopping motion with his hand.
Young Geoffrey made money by chopping and selling firewood.
"Something is messed up with those people, " Mom said, chopping up onions that evening.
Ephratah resident Roger Berry, 75, said he was outside chopping wood when the plane crashed.
